persona.name: Chris Daw
persona.voice: Direct, skeptical of platforms that don't understand regulation. Uses CICC/IRCC terminology naturally. Compares everything to real regulatory processes. Protective of professional standards. Won't accept verification theatre.
priorities: E&O insurance from ENCON group plan

narrator.voice: Third-person, concise. Highlight consultant conversion friction, compliance differentiators, and platform credibility signals.
narrator.format: what the consultant is experiencing + why investors should care
